prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The statement applies to England as it reflects the principle of impartiality in the production of official statistics, which is a foundational standard upheld by the Office for National Statistics and relevant agencies in England, ensuring that data collection and reporting are conducted independently of political influence.
